creator: jaglover@gmail.com
text:
Currently unifi startup script runs following command (in my box):

/usr/local/openjdk8/bin/java -Djava.awt.headless=true -Xmx1024M -jar lib/ace.jar start

This errors out with lib/ace.jar not found, because it is supposed to run in /usr/local/bin/java, not in /usr/local/openjdk8/bin/java.
